welcome.title: Welcome to PageLM
welcome.description: Your AI-powered learning companion. Ask questions, generate quizzes, create notes, and explore new topics with personalized assistance.

ask.title: Ask Anything
ask.description: Simply type your question or topic in the search box. Our AI will provide clear, detailed explanations tailored to your learning needs.

tools.title: Powerful Tools
tools.description: Access Smart Notes, AI Podcasts, Flashcards, Quizzes, and more. Each tool is designed to make learning more effective and enjoyable.

ready.title: You're All Set!
ready.description: Start your learning journey now. Enter a topic below or explore the featured topics to begin discovering new knowledge.
